_comment: Sampling rates, source rates, and anti-alias filter alignment shifts for EGI amplifiers
_source: Extracted from EGI Anti-Alias Filter Alignment.app/Contents/Resources/Sampling Rates.plist

NA400._eeg_shift_note: 250 and 500 Hz overridden from EGI's published Anti-Alias Filter Alignment values (manufacturer: 250->112, 500->66, 1000->36) to rigorously measured delays, which are consistently smaller. Mirrors getFilterDelaySeconds() in src/core/src/EGIAmpClient.cpp.

notes._units: Shift values are milliseconds. They equal samples at source_rate (1000 Hz), which is how they were originally extracted; the C++ code consumes them as milliseconds.
notes.eeg_shift_msec: Milliseconds to shift EEG data for anti-alias filter alignment
notes.pns_shift_msec: Milliseconds to shift PNS/physio data for filter alignment
notes.pns_diff_msec: Differential milliseconds between EEG and PNS channels
